message:
🌱 Add knative-eventing: v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection mission (#1491)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-3009-v0-14-0-upgrade-job-fails-when-using-istio-auto-injection",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection",
+    "description": "v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify knative-eventing troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your knative-eventing deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\nWhen installing the knative eventing operator the `v0.14.0-upgrade` jobs fails with the following error."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection",
+        "description": "- Add `sidecar.istio.io/inject: \"false\"` to upgrade job\n\n- 🐛 Fix bug\n\n**Release Note**\n```yaml\n{\"level\":\"warn\",\"ts\":1587242704.338062,\"logger\":\"fallback\",\"caller\":\"v0.14.0/upgrader.go:42\",\"msg\":\"Failed to list namespaces: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refu\nBroker Upgrade failed with: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refused\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade knative-eventing to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade knative-eventing:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade knative-eventing knative-eventing/knative-eventing --namespace knative-eventing\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing\nhelm list -n knative-eventing\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- Add `sidecar.istio.io/inject: \"false\"` to upgrade job\n\n- 🐛 Fix bug\n\n**Release Note**",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\"level\":\"warn\",\"ts\":1587242704.338062,\"logger\":\"fallback\",\"caller\":\"v0.14.0/upgrader.go:42\",\"msg\":\"Failed to list namespaces: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refu\nBroker Upgrade failed with: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refused",
+        "apiVersion: batch/v1\nkind: Job\nmetadata:\n  name: v0.14.0-upgrade\n  namespace: knative-eventing\n  labels:\n    eventing.knative.dev/release: \"v0.14.0\"\nspec:\n  template:\n    metadata:\n      annotations:\n        sidecar.istio.io/inject: \"false\"\n    spec:\n      serviceAccountName: eventing-controller\n      restartPolicy: Never\n      containers:\n      - name: upgrade-brokers\n        image: gcr.io/knative-releases/knative.dev/eventing/cmd/upgrade/v0.14.0@sha256:3f796b810f763325678730849021bf53ce7b6016848f880f27298e4db9112d0f"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Job"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/3009",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/pull/3010"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 0,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:26:47.343Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
